ExternalDatabaseInfo.CreateViewSql:
SELECT count(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.surveying_arrange_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "測量_手配待ち件数",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.surveying_arrange_pending_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "測量_手配保留件数",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.surveying_consent_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "測量_承諾待ち件数",
    (count(
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.surveying_result_wait_flg = 1) AND (main.site_survey_flg = 1)) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) + count(
        CASE
            WHEN ((sub.surveying_result_wait_flg = 1) AND (main.gove_survey_flg = 1)) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END)) AS "測量_結果待ち件数",
    count(
        CASE
            WHEN (sub.surveying_complete_wait_flg = 1) THEN 1
            ELSE NULL::integer
        END) AS "測量_完了待ち件数"
   FROM (t_object_surveying main
     JOIN m_surveying_status sub ON ((main.surveying_status_id = sub.surveying_status_id)))
  WHERE ((EXISTS ( SELECT 1
           FROM t_object_order
          WHERE ((t_object_order.object_order_id = main.object_order_id) AND (t_object_order.active_flg = 1)))) AND ((sub.surveying_arrange_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.surveying_arrange_pending_flg = 1) OR (sub.surveying_consent_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.surveying_result_wait_flg = 1) OR (sub.surveying_complete_wait_flg = 1)));
